name: oneepis
description: Ficha clinica inteligente, modular y auditable.
author: Gabriel Tesser

ownership.creator: Gabriel Tesser
ownership.notice: OneEpis was created by Gabriel Tesser and is owned by EPIONE.

scripts.check:fast: npm run check:ownership && npm run check:toolchain && npm run check:ci-lanes && npm run check:doc-canon && npm run check:abac-contracts
scripts.check:screens: node scripts/generate-screen-tree.mjs --check && node scripts/check-screen-tree.mjs && node scripts/check-screen-capabilities.mjs
scripts.check:web: npm run check:size && npm run check:frontend-phi-logs && npm run check:web-auth-contract && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.check:contract: node scripts/export-openapi.mjs --check && npm run check:openapi-types && npm run check:patient-route-inventory && npm run check:audit-snapshots && node scripts/check-assistant-read-contract.mjs && node scripts/check-clinical-auth-contract.mjs && npm run check:his-service-catalog && npm run check:clinical-act-catalog && npm run check:screen-service-matrix && npm run check:ai-capability-catalog && node scripts/check-no-production-checklist.mjs && node scripts/check-patient-scoped-read-enforcement.mjs && node scripts/check-doc-canon.mjs
scripts.check:e2e:full: npm --workspace apps/web run test:e2e:full && npm --workspace apps/web run test:e2e:assistant-read
scripts.check: npm run check:ownership && npm run check:toolchain && npm run check:api && npm run check:web && npm run check:contract && npm run check:e2e
